meta.notes: TEPCO standard residential 'Juryo Lighting B' is a 3-tier block rate (~tier1 <120 kWh, tier2 120-300, tier3 >300, rising prices). Block tiers are a v1.1 schema feature — modelled here as the Tier-1 rate. Rate APPROXIMATE in JPY/kWh (~2026) — verify with TEPCO. Excludes the basic (per-ampere) charge + fuel adjustment. Kanto region; other utilities differ.
